creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
Please consider the following patch instead: it updates links to a more recent version, which, among other things, contains an important security fix for those using proxies.  In the new patch I bumped PORTEPOCH, because the Ports version-parsing code erroneously concludes that 2.1pre37 is the 37th patched version of 2.1, rather than a prerelease version predating 2.1.

Regards,  
        b.f.
